creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
56.0.3.65 is after config/milestone.txt was bumped to 56.0.4 but before a particular commit was tagged as 56.0.4 yet. It was a synthetic version based on "git describe" output.
https://github.com/MrAlex94/Waterfox/commit/3c6467364007
https://github.com/MrAlex94/Waterfox/releases/tag/56.0.4 (refers to 91065bd7e2d0)

56.0.4 as binary package will be available ~1 hour (to sync mirrors) after the following build completes.
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/builds/default:default:head-amd64:p460764_s328823:beefy12

The package cluster starts building each Tuesday/Thursday/Saturday at 01:00 UTC. At worst (on OSVERSION bumps) it may take 2 whole days to build a set.
